prompt: Photoreal hero image illustrating: Establish the topic: progress.
source_context: ProgressPrimitive from "@radix-ui/react-progress" import { cn } from "@/lib/utils" function Progress({ className, value, ...props }: ComponentProps<typeof ProgressPrimitive.Root>) { return ( <ProgressPrimitive.Root data-slot="progress" className={cn( "bg-primary/20 relative h-2 w-full overflow-hidden rounded-full", className )} {...props} > <ProgressPrimitive.Indicator data-slot="progress-indicator" className="bg-primary h-full w-full flex-1 transition-all" style={{ transform: `translateX(-${100 - (value || 0)}%)` }} /> </ProgressPrimitive.Root> ) } export { Progress }
